cross-hub-dispatcher-validator.evidence: SignalAction contract and all 9 action types present. create_deal → /portal/sales/opportunities with state; add_to_crm/add_to_note → /portal/crm with state; create_campaign → /portal/marketing/campaigns/new?signal_id= (business) or /brand/campaigns/new?signal_id= (brand). Target pages consume fromSignal/signal_id.

cta-validator.evidence: Shop Now/Buy Now grep on src/pages: 0. No commerce CTAs on intelligence surfaces.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: OpportunityFinder, CrmDashboard, CampaignBuilder (business) have data hooks and consume fromSignal; no new shells introduced.

evidence_question: Can I take an action from a signal and land in the target hub with context carried?
evidence_answer: Yes. Signal → Create Deal navigates to /portal/sales/opportunities with state.fromSignal; OpportunityFinder preselects the signal and shows banner. Signal → Add CRM Note navigates to /portal/crm with state.fromSignal; CrmDashboard creates a crm_task from the action and clears state. Signal → Create Campaign navigates to /portal/marketing/campaigns/new?signal_id= with state; business CampaignBuilder prefills name/objective from fromSignal or useSignal(signal_id). Brand create_campaign already used /brand/campaigns/new?signal_id=. No dead ends; context preserved.
